team_desc: Behind every project are real people with years of experience in accounting, taxes, and law.

process.title: Audit and reverse engineering
process.text: We don't just "pick up" the database. We conduct a deep technical audit: check data integrity in 1C, identify gaps in document chains, analyze tax and accounting registers. We find hidden tax risks, stuck balances, and incorrect entries.

process.title: Data normalization
process.text: Like code refactoring, we rebuild the financial architecture. We restore lost documents, reconcile balances, fix duplicate counterparties. We create a clean master database where every tenge is confirmed.

process.title: Contour automation
process.text: We integrate 1C with client-banks, CRM systems, e-invoicing systems, and virtual warehouses. We set up automatic bank statement downloads, data parsing, and document routing. This eliminates manual entry (human factor) and radically reduces processing time.

process.title: Continuous monitoring (SLA)
process.text: The work moves to the routine maintenance stage. A dedicated team is assigned to you. You get transparent reporting showing the current tax burden, declaration status, and payment plan. Every action is strictly governed by internal regulations.
